headline: IQVIA Announces Offering of Senior Notes
summary: RESEARCH TRIANGLE PARK, N.C., June 03, 2026--IQVIA Holdings Inc. ("IQVIA") (NYSE:IQV) today announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, IQVIA Inc. (the "Issuer"), intends to raise €950,000,000 through an offering of senior notes due 2033 (the "Notes").
